backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages customer leads stored in a map keyed by email, exposing methods to submit, delete, retrieve, and list all leads sorted by name.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: building the InquiryForm component with WhatsApp redirect, and integrating it into App.tsx with a nav link in the Header.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and recent changes, covering components, hooks, styles, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, setting the page title to 'TRI-GITA SERVICES' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections in order, including Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, OdishaGuide, WhyChooseUs, WarrantyGuarantee, Services, InquiryForm, BankFinanceBanner, WhatsAppSection, Footer, and FloatingWhatsAppButton.
frontend/src/components/BankFinanceBanne: Full-width promotional banner highlighting 90% bank loan availability for solar installation, with a WhatsApp CTA button linking to wa.me/917838867880.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Empty contact component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed bottom-right floating button with a WhatsApp icon and tooltip that links to the company's WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Two-column footer displaying brand identity, contact details (phone, email, address, hours), copyright, and attribution, styled with charcoal and amber tokens.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, smooth-scroll nav links, a phone call link, a WhatsApp CTA button, and a hamburger menu for mobile viewports.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-viewport hero section with a background solar image, headline, tagline, and CTA buttons linking to WhatsApp and the inquiry form section.
frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx: Lead-capture form that collects name, phone, email, city, system size, and message, validates inputs, and opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat on submission.
frontend/src/components/OdishaGuide.tsx: Step-by-step guide for applying to PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana in Odisha, covering registration, vendor selection, installation, and subsidy disbursement, along with subsidy tiers, eligibility, documents, and DISCOM list.
frontend/src/components/SchemeInfo.tsx: Informational section explaining the PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana scheme, listing key benefits, eligibility criteria, and a four-step process from consultation to subsidy receipt.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a 'Services' section with two cards (Domestic and Commercial solar installation), each showing an image, feature list, and a CTA button that smooth-scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/WarrantyGuarante: Displays a dark-themed 'Warranty & Guarantee' section with three cards covering 25-year panel, 10-year inverter, and 5-year free service warranties.
Renders a CTA section prompting users to contact solar experts via a WhatsApp link (+91 78388 67880) with a styled green card and decorative blobs.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Displays a 'Why Choose Us' section with three benefit cards (Registered Vendor, Technical Expertise, Hassle-Free Process) highlighting the company's advantages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a `useSubmitLead` mutation hook that calls the backend actor's `submitLead` method and invalidates the 'leads' query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Montserrat, Inter), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) in both light and dark modes using oklch color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts (Montserrat, Inter), oklch-based color tokens mapped to CSS variables, and solar/charcoal color palettes, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording the TRI-GITA SERVICES landing page's existing features (InquiryForm component and its App.tsx integration) and a pending feature request to add a WhatsApp-linked inquiry form targeting number 7838867880.
